text:
[
  {
    "thinking": "The video begins with a loading screen on the Flight Centre website. A blue spinner is visible along with the text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!'. This is a UI state change as the page content is being fetched.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 0,
    "time_end_ms": 15300,
    "description": "The flight search results page is in a loading state with a spinner and promotional messaging.",

    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results",
    "frame_description": "A red header with flight search parameters is visible above a white content area containing a loading spinner and the text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!'."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "At approximately 15300ms, the loading state ends and the flight results for Sydney to Melbourne are displayed on the screen.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 15300,
    "time_end_ms": 15800,
    "description": "The search results for the departing flight from Sydney to Melbourne load and become visible.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results",
    "frame_description": "The page now displays a list of available flights with details like departure time, airline logo, and price buttons."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor over the price button for the first flight result (Qantas QF401) and pauses briefly before clicking.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 38500,
    "time_end_ms": 39200,
    "description": "The cursor hovers over the price button for the 6:00 AM Qantas flight.",
    "confidence": 0.8,
    "interaction_target": "$307",
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is positioned over the blue button labeled 'From $307' in the first flight result row."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks the price button to see more details for that specific flight.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 39200,
    "time_end_ms": 39200,
    "description": "User clicks on the price button for the 6:00 AM Qantas flight to expand fare options.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "$307",
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results",
    "frame_description": "The price button is activated, triggering a layout change in the flight result row."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Immediately after the click, the flight row expands to reveal different fare types and their respective inclusions.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 39200,
    "time_end_ms": 39600,
    "description": "The flight result row expands to show 'Red eDeal' and 'Economy Flex' fare options.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results",
    "frame_description": "Two columns appear below the flight summary, detailing the features and prices of different fare classes."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor to the 'SELECT' button for the 'Red eDeal' fare and pauses before clicking.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 46800,
    "time_end_ms": 47600,
    "description": "The cursor hovers over the 'SELECT' button for the Red eDeal fare.",
    "confidence": 0.8,
    "interaction_target": "SELECT",
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is over the blue 'SELECT' button within the Red eDeal fare column."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks the 'SELECT' button to choose the Red eDeal fare for the departing flight.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 47600,
    "time_end_ms": 47600,
    "description": "User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the Red eDeal fare.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "SELECT",
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results",

  },
  {
    "thinking": "The UI updates to confirm the selection. The button changes appearance to indicate it has been chosen.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 48400,
    "time_end_ms": 48800,
    "description": "The 'SELECT' button changes to a green checkmark, confirming the fare selection.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results",
    "frame_description": "The blue button is replaced by a green square with a white checkmark."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "After selecting the outbound flight, the system begins loading the return flight options. A transition screen appears.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 53300,
    "time_end_ms": 57150,
    "description": "A 'Good choice!' overlay with a loading spinner appears as the page prepares to show return flight options.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results",
    "frame_description": "The screen is partially obscured by a white overlay with the text 'Good choice!' and a blue loading spinner."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The URL changes to include '#inbound', indicating a navigation to the next step of the booking process (selecting the return flight).",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 57150,
    "time_end_ms": 59900,
    "description": "The page navigates to the return flight selection screen.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results#inbound",
    "frame_description": "The address bar updates to show the new URL, and the page content refreshes to show return flights from Melbourne to Sydney."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor to the 'CHANGE' link next to the departing flight summary at the top of the page.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 63800,
    "time_end_ms": 64300,
    "description": "The cursor hovers over the 'CHANGE' link for the departing flight.",

    "interaction_target": "CHANGE",
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results#inbound",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is positioned over the blue 'CHANGE' text in the summary section at the top right."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks 'CHANGE' to go back and modify their departing flight selection.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 64300,
    "time_end_ms": 64300,

    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "CHANGE",
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results#inbound",
    "frame_description": "The 'CHANGE' link is clicked, triggering a navigation back to the previous state."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The page navigates back to the outbound flight results. The URL reverts to the original results page.",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 64300,
    "time_end_ms": 66000,
    "description": "The page navigates back to the departing flight selection screen.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_title": "Flight Centre Travel Group - Results",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXY9kh1/results",
    "frame_description": "The URL in the address bar changes back, and the page content updates to show the list of departing flights from Sydney to Melbourne again."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user scrolls down through the list of departing flights, likely re-evaluating their options.",
    "type": "scroll",
    "time_start_ms": 66100,
